name: io.github.cachly-dev/cachly-mcp
description: The world's first Cognitive Cache — AI memory that thinks. 65 MCP tools: persistent sessions, causal root-cause tracing, knowledge decay scoring, brain diff, memory consolidation, knowledge syndication, zero-config autopilot. Works with Claude, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, Gemini. German servers, GDPR-native.
